title: Document logging framework
description: Store-client: Whenever used, creates a c:/ directory and several directories underneath it to store its log files.  Sending logs to STDOUT by default and/or having a documented way to changes this would be good.

title: Allow expected checksum value to be included when adding a content item
description: Update the DuraStore REST API call for storing a content item to allow for including an MD5 checksum value which is compared with the stored file's checksum to ensure that the file was received correctly.

title: Allow for simple updating of project version numbers
description: It should be easy/simple to update the version number of all parts of the baseline for each release.

title: JPEG2K: Image server service
description: Service wrapper and service to serve JPEG2K images.

title: Create content retrieval tool
description: This tool is the complement to the Sync Tool: A command line utility which would be used to pull content from a DuraCloud space to the local file system. Part of that activity is reconstituting any chunked files.
